MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Veronika Cauley is present in Pro Per.
Tracey Orick for Defendant Richard Van Dusen, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the agreement for premises located at 3476 San Bruno Ave., #3, San Francisco, CA 94134. See scanned document. Trial date of 12/22/08 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
